step.title: Generate Fixtures goal (single goal, phase=fixtures)
step.rule: All per-BC infrastructure goals MUST exist in goals.yaml before this step runs. If no infrastructure goals are found, ABORT with error.
This is a SINGLE goal — never split per-BC. All fixtures load together because they share FK dependencies.
depends_on MUST include EVERY infrastructure goal ID — dynamically collected from goals.yaml, not hardcoded (G-03).

substep.title: Collect all infrastructure goal IDs
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Filter all goal entries where phase=infrastructure. Collect their goal IDs into INFRA_GOAL_IDS list.

check.action: ABORT with error: "No infrastructure goals found in goals.yaml — cannot generate fixtures goal without schema dependencies"

substep.rule: This MUST be dynamic — BC count varies per project. Never hardcode goal IDs.

substep.title: Derive the coarse deliverable_area
substep.action: Set FIXTURES_AREA = the fixtures deliverable directory in the resolved topology — contexts/{BC}/src/Bundle/DataFixtures/ (the per-BC fixtures directory the shard's old entity-inventory referenced; this single goal spans every BC's fixtures), where {BC} is the bounded-context name from the resolved conventions/topology. This is a COARSE path (the depinfer produce/consume seed + the elaborator's tree-read anchor), NOT a glob and NOT a per-file path.
substep.rule: Do NOT resolve the fixtures template, read the domain model for the entity inventory, or author any acceptance/validate/investigator/not-in-scope here — those are Tier-2 (/tmux:elaborate authors them at dispatch). The roadmap skeleton commits only to the coarse deliverable_area.

substep.title: Call goal-create MCP (roadmap skeleton)
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Create test fixtures for all entities with test users and pagination data
INFRA_GOAL_IDS — ALL infrastructure goal IDs collected in substep 3.17.1

substep.rule: Description is 73 characters — within the 120-char limit (MaxGoalDescriptionLength).
max_retries=3 (G-11) — fixture issues are typically FK ordering or missing entity, fixable in few cycles.
depends_on MUST be the FULL INFRA_GOAL_IDS list — never just the last one (G-03).

NO validate/acceptance/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — this is a roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors every concrete field at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "Fixtures skeleton created: goal-{{ID}} (phase=fixtures, status=roadmap, depends_on={{INFRA_GOAL_IDS}}, deliverable_area={{FIXTURES_AREA}})"
